label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 10

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won the 31.1km Alicante ITT by 48 seconds over Roglic, extending his GC lead from 1:12 to 2:41
tactical_patterns: Evenepoel gained 36 seconds at first intermediate check alone, revealing early-course power more decisive than final kilometers in flat TTs.
Roglic gained 12 seconds on Cavagna's benchmark showing strong domestique-level performance, yet still hemorrhaged 48 seconds exposing GC vulnerability.
Mas lost over 1 minute confirming ITT weakness transforms mountain-only defense into 3+ minute deficit management strategy.
Rodriguez lost 1:17 revealing young climbers lacking TT discipline face exponential GC gaps even on short flat courses.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: 55.7 kph average demonstrates exceptional sustained power output that transforms modest 1:12 lead into commanding 2:41 advantage
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: 12-second gain over Cavagna benchmark shows solid form but 48-second loss reveals insufficient ITT power to challenge Evenepoel
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: Over 1-minute loss confirms ITT liability drops him from 1:12 to 3:03 down, eliminating GC threat without mountain demolition
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Strong TT performance described as rekindling Giro form suggests returning to elite stage-racing condition at race midpoint
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: Navigation error into team car evacuation lane cost 20+ seconds revealing concentration lapse under pressure
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: negative: 1:17 loss described as upset confirms expectations exceeded reality, signaling overestimation of ITT capabilities
